rules: Use leading-none for headings, leading-relaxed for body
Never use Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans for headings
No teal (#1B93A4) or purple (#9D4CDD) allowed, especially for CTAs or Dashboards
Use Electric Lime (#D4FF00) for energetic highlights like 'Online' status, active route line, or small badges
Primary CTAs must use Deep Forest Green (#0B3B24) or Obsidian Black (#111827)
Always set hover states explicitly, ensuring text remains readable (e.g., hover:bg-[#082a19] hover:text-white)

layout_and_spacing.system: Tailwind Scale: generous padding (p-4 to p-8) for mobile interfaces
layout_and_spacing.customer_app: Map-centric. Map takes up 60-70% of the viewport. Overlaid with Bottom Sheets (rounded-t-3xl) with a 1px inner border to separate from the map.
layout_and_spacing.driver_app: Control Room Grid for the earnings dashboard. Dense, scanable blocks. Generous padding inside data cards.
layout_and_spacing.admin_app: Data-dense lists with sticky headers. Use solid backgrounds, not glassmorphism, for maximum readability of metrics.
rules: Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-4 or p-6) to prevent text collision

components.buttons: Flat, slightly rounded (rounded-lg). Deep Forest Green bg, White text. Minimal animations.
components.cards: Neumorphism 'Clay & Crisp' variant: Soft shadow (shadow-sm) + 1px subtle border (border-black/5). Crisp white background.
components.bottom_sheet: Used for 'Where to?', Vehicle Selection, and Booking Confirmation. High z-index, crisp white background.
components.map_markers: Custom SVG markers using the Electric Lime accent for high visibility against standard map tiles.
components.forms: Use Shadcn-inspired clean inputs. No native HTML unstyled elements.

driver_avatar.description: Smiling delivery driver wearing a red polo shirt

rules: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='vehicle-select-button', data-testid='login-submit')
Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio for text. Text over lime accent must be black.
Support prefers-reduced-motion for bottom sheet transitions

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the React Native Expo app utilizing NativeWind (Tailwind for RN) classes mapping to these guidelines.
Use .js files. Do not use TypeScript (.tsx) syntax.
Customer App: Focus on the map view taking 70% of the screen with a floating bottom sheet for 'Where to' and Vehicle selection.
Driver App: Implement an prominent Online/Offline toggle using the Electric Lime (#D4FF00) accent for the active 'Online' state.
Admin App: Use structured lists and tables for Driver/Customer/Booking management.
Never use placeholders for images. Always use the provided image URLs.
Enforce data-testid on all key interactive elements as per E1's Universal Design Rules.
Apply a 1px subtle border to cards and bottom sheets to give them the 'Clay & Crisp' definition.
